intro: Deplanchea bulwerii, also known as Bulwer's tree or Bulwer's leaved tree, is a plant species native to the island of New Caledonia, belonging to the family Icacinaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, pain, and respiratory issues.
